name: Capcom
description: Japanese developer and publisher known for Mega Man, Street Fighter, Resident Evil, Monster Hunter, and Devil May Cry.

eras.title: Arcade and NES Era
eras.description: Early arcade hits and the rise of Capcom's NES identity.

eras.title: Fighting Game Era
eras.description: Street Fighter II, arcade dominance, and major console franchises.

eras.title: Survival and Action Era
eras.description: Resident Evil, Devil May Cry, Monster Hunter, and Capcom's 3D action identity.

eras.title: Modern Revival Era
eras.description: Major comeback period led by Resident Evil, Monster Hunter, and polished legacy revivals.
